center.name: Seasonal semideciduous forest
center.summary: Seasonal semideciduous forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Narrow-billed antwren，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In part of Bahia it also occurs in mata-de-cipó, a biome characterized by a relatively open understorey and a few large emergent trees above a dense mid-storey
